top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) = '1980' 
  AND p.Diagnosis LIKE '%RA%';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) = '1980' 
  AND p.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) = '1980' 
  AND p.Diagnosis LIKE '%RA%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.Birthday >= '1980-01-01' 
  AND p.Birthday <= '1980-12-31'
  AND p.Diagnosis LIKE '%RA%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.Birthday LIKE '1980-%' 
  AND p.Diagnosis = 'RA';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) = '1980' 
  AND p.Diagnosis LIKE '%RA%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.Birthday >= '1980-01-01' 
  AND p.Birthday <= '1980-12-31'
  AND p.Diagnosis LIKE '%RA%';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.Birthday LIKE '1980-%' 
  AND p.Diagnosis = 'RA';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_women
FROM Patient p
WHERE strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) = '1980' 
  AND p.Diagnosis LIKE '%RA%';
